docket_entries.description: ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT: PENDING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: SYLVIA L. HUSING; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF **SEE THE SIGNATURE SECTION OF USPS GREEN RETURN RECEIPT CARD** SERVED FEB-13-2023, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT TOM, DR.WILLIAM
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM OR HEARING OFFICER.(SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY CHIU, KUNG-KAY TOM, DR.WILLIAM
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,300.00 FILED BY CHIU, KUNG-KAY AS TO DEFENDANT TOM, DR.WILLIAM ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-23-2023 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHIU, KUNG-KAY AS TO DEFENDANT TOM, DR.WILLIAM

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-23-2023 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION DUE TO THE CONDITION OF THE COURT CALENDAR TO MAR-23-2023 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PARTIES HAVE BEEN INFORMED BY THE COURTROOM CLERK VIA PHONE AND CONTINUED DATE & TIME IS AGREED BY ALL PARTIES. CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-23-2023 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO APR-12-2023 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF KUNG-KAY CHIU (SPELLING OF LAST NAME IS CORRECTED PER PLAINTIFF) IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DR.WILLIAM TOM IS PRESENT. PARTIES REACHED A SETTLEMENT WHEREIN DEFENDANT WILL PAY PLAINTIFF $2,160.00 FOR SETTLEMENT AND MUTUAL RELEASE OF ALL CLAIMS RELATED TO THIS ACTION. PROGRESS REPORT HEARING SET FOR WED. APRIL 12, 2023 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. IF NO APPEARANCES, THEN CASE IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ORDER TO DISMISS CASE WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.
